div.div: EpochSettler · CoverageMonitor · ReserveBalancer react(LogRecord) enforce monotonic nonce, schedule callback

div.div: One closed loop, fully on-chain: a hook event on Unichain is caught on Lasna and a callback is scheduled back to Unichain — no bot, no cron.
